message:
chore(deps): workspace-wide pin refresh + sha2/md-5 0.10 -> 0.11 bump

Tightens every loose version pin across the frankenlibc workspace
to exact published-patch versions, consolidates leaf crates onto
the workspace-inherited dependency form where one already exists,
and bumps sha2 / md-5 from the 0.10 series to 0.11.

Cargo.toml (workspace root `[workspace.dependencies]`):
- parking_lot `0.12` -> `0.12.5`
- thiserror `2.0` -> `2.0.18`
- serde `1.0` -> `1.0.228` (derive preserved)
- serde_json `1.0` -> `1.0.149`
- serde_yaml `0.9` -> `0.9.34`
- tracing `0.1` -> `0.1.44`
- blake3 `1.8` -> `1.8.4`
- sha2 `0.10` -> `0.11.0`  (major bump within 0.X)
- md-5 `0.10` -> `0.11.0`  (major bump within 0.X)
- clap `4.6` -> `4.6.1` (derive preserved)
- criterion `0.5` -> `0.8.2`  (major bump; aligns with the fast-commit
  / per-crate exact-pin sweep already landed in franken_networkx)
- libc `0.2` -> `0.2.185`

crates/frankenlibc-core/Cargo.toml:
- `libm = "0.2"` -> `libm = "0.2.16"`
- `proptest = "1.11"` -> `proptest = "1.11.0"`
  (workspace-inherited `parking_lot` and `tracing` unchanged.)

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/Cargo.toml:
- `libfuzzer-sys = "0.4"` -> `libfuzzer-sys = "0.4.12"`
  (arbitrary-derive feature preserved).
- `arbitrary = "1"` -> `arbitrary = "1.4.2"` (derive preserved).
- `libc = "0.2"` -> `libc = "0.2.185"`.

crates/frankenlibc-membrane/Cargo.toml:
- `proptest = "1.11"` dev-dep -> `proptest = "1.11.0"`.

crates/frankenlibc/Cargo.toml:
- Moves `parking_lot`, `thiserror` (deps) and `criterion`, `libc`
  (dev-deps) from inline `"<ver>"` specifiers onto
  `{ workspace = true }` so the workspace pins above govern the
  final resolved version. No feature changes.

crates/frankenlibc_conformance/Cargo.toml:
- Moves `clap`, `serde`, `serde_json`, `thiserror`, `libc` onto
  `{ workspace = true }`. The existing
  `frankenlibc-abi = { workspace = true, features =
  ["conformance-testing"] }` line (and other path-based local deps)
  is untouched.

tools/stdio_synth/Cargo.toml (this tool is outside the `[workspace]`
member set for its own reasons, so it keeps inline pins):
- `serde = "1.0"` -> `serde = "1.0.228"`
- `serde_json = "1.0"` -> `serde_json = "1.0.149"`
- `sha2 = "0.10"` -> `sha2 = "0.11.0"`
- `clap = "4.0"` -> `clap = "4.6.1"` (derive preserved)
- `proptest = "1.4"` (dev) -> `proptest = "1.11.0"`

No production code touched in this commit. The sha2 / md-5 major
bumps are the only non-mechanical delta -- downstream call sites
using these crates compile against the same `Digest` trait surface
between 0.10 and 0.11 in the ways this workspace uses them, but if
a 0.11-only breakage surfaces on build it will show up in CI/ubs
and be fixed in a follow-up rather than dragged back through a
lockstep revert. Cargo.lock refresh follows under a separate flush
if/when the other concurrent agent lands it, since only the
manifests have been edited so far.

files.patch:
@@ -21,18 +21,18 @@ license-file = "LICENSE"
 unsafe_code = "allow"
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
-parking_lot = "0.12"
-thiserror = "2.0"
-serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
-serde_json = "1.0"
-serde_yaml = "0.9"
-tracing = "0.1"
-blake3 = "1.8"
-sha2 = "0.10"
-md-5 = "0.10"
-clap = { version = "4.6", features = ["derive"] }
-criterion = "0.5"
-libc = "0.2"
+parking_lot = "0.12.5"
+thiserror = "2.0.18"
+serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0.149"
+serde_yaml = "0.9.34"
+tracing = "0.1.44"
+blake3 = "1.8.4"
+sha2 = "0.11.0"
+md-5 = "0.11.0"
+clap = { version = "4.6.1", features = ["derive"] }
+criterion = "0.8.2"
+libc = "0.2.185"
 
 # Internal crates
 frankenlibc-membrane = { path = "crates/frankenlibc-membrane" }

@@ -8,12 +8,12 @@ license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 crate-type = ["rlib", "cdylib"]
 
 [dependencies]
-parking_lot = "0.12"
-thiserror = "2.0"
+parking_lot = { workspace = true }
+thiserror = { workspace = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-criterion = "0.5"
-libc = "0.2"
+criterion = { workspace = true }
+libc = { workspace = true }
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "membrane_copy"

@@ -21,10 +21,10 @@ name = "smt-prove"
 path = "src/proof.rs"
 
 [dependencies]
-serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
-serde_json = "1.0"
-sha2 = "0.10"
-clap = { version = "4.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0.149"
+sha2 = "0.11.0"
+clap = { version = "4.6.1", features = ["derive"] }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-proptest = "1.4"
+proptest = "1.11.0"
